title: Added Local Analytics Tag Registry Mutation API
summary: Moved tag registry import and mutate-tag preview/apply routes into the local Studio app server while leaving alias and promote/demote workflows for later slices.
effect: Migrated local app pages can now import registry rows and preview/apply registry edits or deletes through /studio/api/analytics/import-tag-registry, /studio/api/analytics/mutate-tag-preview, and /studio/api/analytics/mutate-tag. The routes reuse existing registry mutation, alias rewrite, assignment rewrite, atomic write, backup, logging, and activity helpers, while demote/promote and alias mutation routes remain on the old tag write server until later slices.
verification: Python compile checks passed for the touched Studio app server, analytics adapter, config, and smoke files
node --check passed for assets/studio/js/tag-registry-service.js and assets/studio/js/studio-transport.js
